title: TpmRc::is_success takes &self but TpmRc is Copy — should take self
description: wolftpm/src/error.rs: TpmRc::is_success(&self) takes a shared reference. TpmRc is Copy, so taking &self forces an unnecessary dereference step. Idiomatic Rust for Copy types: take self by value. pub fn is_success(self) -> bool. No semantic change; this is a Clippy-level idiom.
